title: Unidentified red-armored Sith Lord

An '''individual''' was a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] by [[6900 BBY]]. Becoming a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]], they fought against the Order during the [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]], at the conclusion of which they were among the [[Exiles|group]] of Dark Jedi [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|exiled]] from known [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. Discovering the [[Sith Worlds/Legends|region]] inhabited by the [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith species]], the exiles became [[Sith Lord/Legends|rulers]] of the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]], with the [[Armor/Legends|armored]] Dark Jedi individual eventually becoming a [[Sith Warrior]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] individual served as a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]<ref name="TGAotS0" /> by [[6900 BBY]].<ref name="6900 BBY">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 0|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 0]] establishes that the [[Sith Warrior]] was originally a member of the [[Exiles|group]] of [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] who were [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|exiled]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and subsequently arrived in [[Sith Worlds/Legends|Sith Space]]. [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] dates both of those events to [[6900 BBY]].</ref> They became a member of the group of [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] who opposed the Jedi Order during the conflict<ref name="TGAotS0" /> known as the [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]]. After the Dark Jedi were defeated during the [[Battle of Corbos|final battle]] of that war in 6900 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|exiled]] their [[Exiles|surviving enemies]],<ref name="JvS">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref> including the individual who would at one point wear [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]], to uncharted [[Realspace/Legends|space]], where the Dark Jedi eventually arrived in the region known as [[Sith Worlds/Legends|Sith Space]].<ref name="TGAotS0" />

There, the exiles became [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]],<ref name="JvS" /> rulers of the [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith species']] [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. The armored Sith Lord,<ref name="TGAotS0" /> who eventually became a member of the [[Sith Warrior]] martial tradition,<ref name="TDSS">''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]''</ref> was at one point present at an open space overlooked by a large audience, with a member of the Sith [[Species/Legends|species]] kneeling down and prostrating themselves before the Sith leader.<ref name="TGAotS0" />

==Equipment==
The Sith Lord wore a red [[Clothing/Legends|coat]] and articles of black-and-brown clothing along with black pants. They also wore brown [[Boot/Legends|boots]], brown [[Glove/Legends|gloves]], and a brown [[Belt/Legends|belt]] with several pouches. The Sith was equipped with red-colored armor plates that covered their upper torso, [[Limb/Legends|elbows]], forearms, and [[Gauntlet/Legends|hands]], and wore a red [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] with a black visor. A [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] was clipped to their belt.<ref name="TDSS" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Sith Lord first appeared in a flashback scene in the [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 0|prologue issue]] of [[Dark Horse Comics]]' ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] mini-series. The issue was written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]], penciled by [[Chris Gossett]],<ref name="TGAotS0" /> and published on [[July 31]], [[1996]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54589/star_wars_tales_of_the_jedi_-_the_golden_age_of_the_sith_1996|text=Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi - The Golden Age of the Sith (1996)}}</ref>
